site_description: Cutting, machining, and heat treatment services for industrial tooling and steel supply in Cikarang.
hero_kicker: Established in 2011 in Delta Silicon II
hero_title: Dedicated steel processing for manufacturers that move fast.
hero_body: Sinar Putra Metalindo provides cutting, machining, and heat treatment services from a strategic industrial location in Lippo Cikarang.
hero_capability_cutting_body: Prepared steel materials for production teams that need reliable lead times.
hero_capability_machining_body: Machining support that helps reduce production waiting time and outside handling.
hero_capability_heat_body: Treatment facilities that improve tooling performance for demanding industrial use.
profile_hero_title: A focused steel processing partner in the Cikarang industrial corridor.
profile_hero_body: Since 2011, Sinar Putra Metalindo has supported manufacturing teams with practical steel supply, processing, and technical service from Delta Silicon II.
profile_vision_title: Dedicated in steel, delivering innovative solutions for industrial needs.
profile_vision_body: SPM focuses on dependable steel processing solutions that help customers meet production, tooling, and quality requirements.
profile_mission_title: A practical operating culture built around quality, teamwork, and trust.
profile_mission_1: Build a continuous and systematic operating system to support mutual welfare.
profile_mission_2: Build honesty, responsibility, and teamwork across divisions to create innovative and capable people.
profile_mission_3: Provide quality solutions aligned with customer wants and needs.
profile_mission_4: Create innovative relationships by choosing trusted suppliers that help maintain quality and customer trust.
profile_industry_title: Material supply, machining, and heat treatment support in one practical workflow.
profile_industry_body: The profile page on the original site highlights heat treatment coverage and core process support for industrial tooling requirements.
profile_process_raw_material_body: Steel material supply for manufacturers that need dependable availability and documentation.
profile_process_machining_body: Milling and grinding services help customers reduce outside handling and production lead time.
profile_process_heat_treatment_body: Heat treatment capabilities support stronger tooling performance, including hardening and stress relief requirements.
profile_process_heat_treatment_link_intr: Please visit our professional heat treatment sister company website for more detail:
profile_certificate_title: Material documentation to support customer quality requirements.
profile_certificate_body: SPM supports traceability with supplier material certificates from trusted steel makers.
profile_certificate_material_body: SPM provides material certificates to support traceability and procurement documentation.
profile_certificate_quality_body: SPM works with trusted suppliers to help maintain material quality and customer confidence.
intro_title: Built around reliable supply, responsive service, and long-term customer partnerships.
intro_body: SPM believes in continuous expansion to keep pace with rising customer demand. Our teams combine professional support, same-day order processing subject to capacity, and practical technical guidance for production needs.
intro_point_1: Strategic access from Delta Silicon II Industrial Park
intro_point_2: Cutting, milling, grinding, and heat treatment support
intro_point_3: Technical assistance for tooling performance and lead-time planning
services_title: Industrial service designed for production teams.
services_hero_title: Technical service for steel supply, processing, and quality control.
services_hero_body: SPM combines cutting, machining, heat treatment coordination, inspection tools, and training support so production teams can move with clearer lead times.
services_overview_title: Practical steel processing support from material preparation to finishing.
services_cutting_body: Steel materials are prepared to customer dimensions with cutting support for production, tooling, and maintenance requirements.
services_machining_body: Milling and grinding support helps customers reduce outside handling and keep material preparation closer to one workflow.
services_heat_body: Heat treatment coordination supports tooling performance, durability, and process requirements for demanding industrial use.
services_support_title: Quality checks and process guidance for production decisions.
services_support_body: SPM supports customers with practical technical assistance, measurement tools, and lab inspection references for material and tooling requirements.
services_support_point_1: Material and process consultation before work starts.
services_support_point_2: Inspection support using measuring and testing equipment.
services_support_point_3: Daily capacity and delivery planning based on active workload.
services_lab_image_2_alt: SPM lab equipment for material checking
services_lab_image_3_alt: SPM technical support team in the lab
services_tools_title: Inspection equipment for checking dimensions, hardness, and material condition.
services_tools_body: The services page on the original site highlights measurement tools as part of SPM technical support. This section presents them as a working inspection system.
services_tool_caliper_body: Dimensional checks for prepared materials and machined workpieces.
services_tool_hardness_body: Hardness checks to support heat treatment verification and tooling performance review.
services_tool_granite_body: Stable surface reference for dimensional inspection and precision checking.
services_tool_spectrometer_body: Material composition checking to support traceability and technical confirmation.
services_training_title: Product knowledge training for customer teams.
services_training_body: SPM provides product knowledge training to help customer teams understand material selection, handling, processing requirements, and quality expectations for daily production.
services_training_inside_body: Product knowledge sessions can be arranged with SPM teams for direct material and process discussion.
services_training_onsite_body: Customer-site training helps align material usage, handling, and inspection expectations with production conditions.
services_training_image_2_alt: SPM team giving product knowledge training
services_training_image_3_alt: SPM training discussion with customer teams
service_workforce_body: A service culture built on dedication, excellence, and practical partnership with customers.
service_same_day_body: Orders can be processed and prepared for delivery on the same day, depending on daily capacity.
service_machining_body: Milling, grinding, and heat treatment support customers who need shorter lead times and stronger tooling performance.
service_support_body: Experienced support teams assist customers with material, process, and production requirements.
customers_title: Trusted by manufacturing teams across automotive and industrial supply chains.
contact_title: Talk to SPM about steel processing requirements.
contact_hero_body: Send an inquiry, call our team, or visit our office to discuss material supply, cutting, machining, and heat treatment support.
contact_form_title: Share the material, process, or delivery details you need.
contact_form_subject: New inquiry from Sinar Putra Metalindo website
contact_form_success_message: Thank you. Our team will review your inquiry and contact you as soon as possible.
contact_form_error_message: Something went wrong while sending your inquiry. Please try again or contact us by phone.
contact_form_missing_key_message: The email form key is not configured yet. Please contact us by phone while this is being set up.
contact_address: Jl. Johar Blok F6 No. 3 A-B, Delta Silicon II Industrial Park, Lippo Cikarang Bekasi 17550
contact_visit_body: SPM operates from Delta Silicon II Industrial Park, with practical access for manufacturers across the Cikarang industrial corridor.
capacity_note: Please consult with us regarding daily capacity.
